summary: Wall Pop - a web application with image display and background customization features
known_issues: General functionality not working as expected

existing_features.title: Update all references from 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop' throughout the application, including the Header component logo text, page title in index.html, manifest.json app name and short_name, and any other branding references

Improve text readability across the application by adding semi-transparent dark backgrounds behind all text content, especially on pages using the skull-flames background image. Ensure text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1) against backgrounds

Conduct a comprehensive audit of all application functionality to identify and fix any non-working features. Test image generation (text-to-image and image-to-image), image gallery display, download functionality, delete operations, profile setup, authentication flow, and admin panel access
Provide the complete project as a downloadable package that includes all source files, configuration, and assets in a single organized folder structure that can be easily copied, shared, or deployed

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix text readability - improve contrast or add background behind text
Provide complete project as downloadable zip file
Review and fix all non-working functionality
